default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SentinelOne's CVE database project progress, content strategy, and design updates.](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE page designs nearly finalized; development can begin while awaiting minor tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Content production for CS 101 blog progressing; 10 articles ready for review, 5 new in progress](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [CVE database launch targeted for mid-October; specifics on content volume and publishing cadence TBD](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Prompt hacking report blog already showing positive SEO results (4th-5th position)](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### Design Updates and Approval

  - [Most design feedback implemented; awaiting final color codes from Christian](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Team alignment on current designs allows move to responsive design and development](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Minor UI tweaks may occur, but component development can proceed](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Georgemaine requested internal sign-off to finalize designs](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

### Content Production and Review

  - [10 articles in "content ready for review" status in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [5 new blog posts in progress this week](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Additional keyword research planned for AI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Mansi to share S1's content calendar to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Some TOC concerns noted; feedback expected by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Prompt hacking report blog already ranking 4th-5th position](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Showing clicks and impressions in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Performance tracking via Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### CVE Database Strategy

  - [Considering CVEs from 2020-2025 (potentially 5000+ entries)](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Aida to consult team on optimal publishing cadence (suggested \~100/week)](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Start with 2025 CVEs and work backwards](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [SEMrush keyword list for CVE-2025 includes \~2,600 keywords (pre-deduplication)](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Marisol has begun generating CVE content to test the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Development and Launch Timeline

  - [Mid-October targeted for CVE database go-live](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Nicholas and S1 web team to discuss specifics in today's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [GrowthX team flexible to accommodate dev team's timeline](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

### Design Clarifications

  - [Color palette updates not critical; can be adjusted in production](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Responsive designs can follow initial component development](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Development can proceed with desktop experience, then adapt for mobile](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to sync with Sydney and Marisol on CVE content generation plan and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Aida to message Nicholas about CVE page go-live projections before dev team meeting](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Web development to begin on existing components and designs](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Ankit to follow up on color code feedback from Drew (VP of Brand)](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Mansi to share S1's content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Aida to share meeting notes and action items via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Next sync scheduled for following week](https://fathom.video/share/LMVggMd7xNm4J8-ShfktD8QQd2a9isFG?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

action_items.description: Share content calendar for CS one-on-one blog with GrowthX team

Check w/ managing director re best practices for CVE page publishing cadence. Sync w/ Sydney & Marisol on CVE content generation timeline/backlog. Message Nicholas re projections for CVE pages go-live date
